reviews.comment:
La atención de los playeros excelente. Lástima la chica de la mañana que atiende el servicompra nunca tiene cambio y se queda con las monedas del vuelto. Pésima atención siempre de mal humor. Por eso como varios clientes nos fuimos a la Petrobras que esta a unas cuadras..

(Translated by Google)
The service from the gas station attendants was excellent. It's a shame the girl who works the convenience store in the morning never has change and keeps the coins. Terrible service, always in a bad mood. That's why, like several other customers, we went to the Petrobras station a few blocks away.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURneWJmTEx3EAE
